storyboard.content: I have pain and stiffness in multiple joints — my fingers, wrists, and knees.
My joints look a bit puffy and swollen.
I have been feeling generally tired and run down.
The stiffness is worst in the morning and lasts more than an hour before it loosens up.
This has been getting progressively worse over the past 2 months.
The morning stiffness and joint pain are limiting what I can do, especially in the mornings.
I am a 45-year-old woman with no previous joint disease or arthritis diagnosis.
